endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/managedInstances/{managedInstanceName}/databases/{databaseName}/currentSensitivityLabels
endpoints.description: Gets the sensitivity labels of a given database
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEDINSTANCENAME}} with a real managedinstancename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/managedInstances/{managedInstanceName}/databases/{databaseName}/recommendedSensitivityLabels
endpoints.description: Gets the sensitivity labels of a given database
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{MANAGEDINSTANCENAME}} with a real managedinstancename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/managedInstances/{managedInstanceName}/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/tables/{tableName}/columns/{columnName}/sensitivityLabels/{sensitivityLabelSource}
endpoints.description: Gets the sensitivity label of a given column
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MANAGEDINSTANCENAME}} with a real managedinstancename. Replace {{COLUMNNAME}} with a real columnname. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SENSITIVITYLABELSOURCE}} with a real sensitivitylabelsource. Replace {{TABLENAME}} with a real tablename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.description: Disables sensitivity recommendations on a given column

endpoints.description: Enables sensitivity recommendations on a given column (recommendations are enabled by default on all columns)
